overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a dirt path through a lush summer meadow. The character briefly performs a combat action before continuing into a shaded forest area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with scattered oak trees and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the meadow, swords visible on back

entered.detail: winding brown dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
tall deciduous trees with full green summer foliage
clusters of bright red wildflowers growing along the path edge
tall spires of purple flowers scattered in the grass
rolling green hills covered in tall grass and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following a white-haired warrior walking along a dirt path through a sunlit meadow. The landscape features scattered oak trees, colorful wildflowers including red poppies and purple lupines, and rolling green hills under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest path with dense overhead canopy

events.description: character raises right arm and casts a magical sign or throws a projectile while walking
path becomes increasingly shaded as the tree canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path after performing a combat gesture, moving into shaded woodland

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover creating dappled shade on the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character performs a quick combat gesture mid-stride, then continues into a more densely wooded area where the trees form a partial canopy overhead. The lighting shifts from bright direct sunlight to diffused shade as the path narrows and the surrounding vegetation becomes denser.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, sunlit meadow that gradually transitions into a shaded woodland. It begins by trailing a white-haired warrior along a dirt path, surrounded by rolling green hills and colorful wildflowers like red poppies and purple lupines under a bright blue sky. As the character performs a quick combat gesture mid-stride, the open landscape begins to close in. The scene then shifts into a more densely wooded area where the trees form a partial canopy overhead, causing the lighting to fade from bright direct sunlight to a diffused shade. Finally, the path narrows as the surrounding vegetation becomes increasingly dense, enveloping the warrior in the cool shadows of the forest.
